articles.description: New entrant G.K.M. Tamil Kumaran, son of former Pattali Makkal Katchi (PMK) president G.K. Mani, has been given the Pennagaram seat despite severe opposition from some senior leaders

articles.title: Kerala State Disaster Management Authority issues heat warning for election workers
articles.description: Advises precautions against sun exposure and dehydration amid rising temperatures in Kerala

articles.title: Trump roars as US jobs bounce back in March, unemployment falls — ‘Nothing can stop it…’
articles.description: Trump made back to back posts on Truth Social, hailing the unexpected fall in unemployment rates. Nonfarm payrolls rose 178,000 last month, the most since the end of 2024.

articles.title: Karnataka tops in women self-help groups getting training as drone pilots under ‘Namo Drone Didi Yojana’
articles.description: In Karnataka, Koppal district topped the list, with 13 members of SHGs followed by Kalaburagi (12) and Mandya (11)

articles.title: NIMHANS review flags enduring impact of child suicides on parents, mental health professionals
articles.description: The study finds that parents experience intense and prolonged grief marked by guilt, self-blame, and a persistent search for answers, while mental health professionals experience a parallel emotional burden

articles.title: Iran executes two members of banned opposition group MEK for involvement in ‘multiple terrorism acts’
articles.description: The men were found guilty of attempting ‘rebellion through involvement in multiple terrorist acts’, as well as membership in the MEK group and carrying out acts of sabotage aimed at overthrowing the Islamic republic.

topStories.title: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor’s gunman, driver attacked in Malappuram, one held
topStories.description: Police officials said the incident took place when there was a roadblock at the Chelithode bridge as Tharoor was on his way to attend an election campaign event of Congress leader A P Anilkumar.

topStories.title: US Jets Shot Down By Iran In A 1st In 20 Years. Last Time Was During Iraq War
topStories.description: Iran shot down a US F15-E Strike Eagle fighter jet Friday. Iranian state media also said a US A-10 attack aircraft crashed after being hit by Iranian forces.

topStories.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Inflation in focus for markets jostled by Middle East war signals
topStories.description: Upcoming inflation data and initial company earnings will reveal the Middle East war's impact on the U.S. economy and corporations. Investors are closely watching oil prices and their effect on inflation, with the S&P 500 previously struggling due to the conflict. Strong corporate profits are hoped to support stocks despite these concerns.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 36 of US-Israeli attacks?
topStories.description: Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes, as search under way for missing crewmember.

topStories.description: President Trump has unveiled a $1.5 trillion defense budget for the upcoming fiscal year, the largest increase in defense spending since the end of World War II. Here are the areas where he wants the Pentagon to spend more.

topStories.title: Congress MLA disqualified from M.P. Assembly hours after sentence; Congress slams ‘hasty’ move
topStories.description: The Assembly Secretariat disqualified Mr. Bharti’s legislative membership and declared Datia constituency as vacant

topStories.title: Rescue team in Iran face 'harrowing and dangerous' search for US crew member
topStories.description: A former US marine tells the BBC the priority of any recovery team would be to look for signs of life.

topStories.title: Iran brings down US jets: Two pilots rescued, another missing, search underway - 10 updates
topStories.description: Iran escalated the conflict by shooting down two US military planes, marking the first confirmed aircraft losses since fighting began. Two American service members were rescued, while one remains missing. Over 1,900 casualties have been reported in Iran since February 28.

topStories.title: Top court warns Gujarat over delay in remission
topStories.description: The Supreme Court warns Gujarat to enforce its remission policy, stating delays could lead to illegal detention and potential contempt proceedings against officials.

topStories.description: Congress may support women's reservation bill amendments but opposes rushed delimitation amid ongoing elections, citing potential unfair advantages.

dailyNews.title: TMC candidates summoned for federal probes, Mamata hits out

dailyNews.title: NSUI workers clash with police over RSS-linked event in Rajasthan University
dailyNews.description: The student wing of the Opposition Congress took exception to a programme being organised by Marudhara Nari Sashaktikaran Sangathan at the humanities auditorium on the university campus, saying it was meant to promote the RSS ideology on the pretext of deliberating on women’s empowerment

dailyNews.title: Legendary women's basketball coaches Dawn Staley and Geno Auriemma get into heated shouting match
dailyNews.description: Geno Auriemma and Dawn Staley were seen in a heated shouting match on the sideline during UConn's March Madness Final Four loss to South Carolina.

dailyNews.title: Power 4 college sports conferences react to Trump's latest executive order
dailyNews.description: Leaders of the Big Ten, SEC, ACC and Big 12 support Trump's executive order on college sports and are pushing Congress to pass the SCORE Act quickly.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ‘America needs God’ in Good Friday message touting ‘resurgence of religion'
dailyNews.description: In a Good Friday address, President Donald Trump claimed religion is growing again in the U.S. for the first time in decades as Holy Week and Easter are celebrated.

dailyNews.title: Astronaut Victor Glover praised for saying moon mission is 'human history,' not 'Black history'
dailyNews.description: Victor Glover said the Artemis II mission represents “human history," not identity-based milestones. His remarks gained traction online and drew praise from conservatives.

dailyNews.title: Democrat governor and mayor booed at Red Sox home opener
dailyNews.description: Fans at Fenway Park booed Gov. Maura Healey and Mayor Michelle Wu at the Red Sox home opener, with footage going viral and sparking GOP reactions.

dailyNews.title: NFL clears Rashee Rice of league policy violations after probe into ex-girlfriend's abuse allegations
dailyNews.description: The NFL said Chiefs wide receiver Rashee Rice was cleared after an independent probe found insufficient evidence he violated the league’s personal conduct policy.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II astronauts nearly halfway to the moon; NASA shares stunning photos from Orion spacecraft
dailyNews.description: The four Artemis II astronauts are nearly halfway to the moon since launching Wednesday, while taking some stunning images. NASA says the mission is going well.

dailyNews.title: Lakers superstar Luka Dončić suffers season-ending injury
dailyNews.description: Luka Doncic, averaging 33.5 points per game, is out for the rest of the regular season with a hamstring strain as the Lakers prepare for the NBA playoffs.

dailyNews.title: California 4-year-old boy survives attack by coyote that bit and tried to drag him away
dailyNews.description: A 4-year-old boy had seven puncture wounds after a coyote attacked him in Southern California. The repeat offender was later euthanized.

topStories.title: Trump gives rare praise to persistent GOP foe after White House ballroom vote
topStories.description: Trump gives a special shout out to Sen. Rand Paul after the fiscal hawk votes yes on plans for the estimated $400 million White House ballroom project.

topStories.description: The New York Times went viral for botching the name of NATO in a print headline about President Donald Trump's ongoing threat to the treaty organization.

topStories.description: Stephen A. Smith weighed in on President Trump attending Supreme Court arguments on birthright citizenship, saying he doesn’t blame the move and calling the issue significant.

topStories.description: With the midterms approaching, the president may be running out of time to get new cabinet members confirmed without bipartisan support.

topStories.description: The huge proposed increase would be partly offset by steep cuts to domestic programs, some of which the Trump administration describes as wasteful.

topStories.description: The memorandum calls for paying employees at the Coast Guard, Federal Emergency Management Agency and Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency who have gone without pay during a record-long shutdown.

topStories.description: The plan faces significant local political opposition and the dilapidated state of the site poses considerable logistical challenges.

dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders DHS to pay all employees despite shutdown
dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered the Department of Homeland Security to find a way to pay "each and every employee" of the agency.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
dailyNews.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
